description: Create recommendation models (Two-Tower retrieval, collaborative, trending, MMoE ranking, score fusion, anti-rage scorer, DPP diversity, full pipeline, on-device ranker) and A/B testing framework in packages/recommendations/src/
steps: Create packages/recommendations/src/retrieval/two-tower.ts - TwoTowerRetrieval class: User tower (embedding from user features) + Item tower (embedding from item features) producing embeddings, then ANN retrieval via Qdrant-like interface. Methods: encodeUser(features), encodeItem(features), retrieve(userEmbedding, k) returning top-k candidates with scores.

Create packages/recommendations/src/retrieval/collaborative.ts - ItemItemCollaborative class: computes item-item similarity using cosine on co-occurrence vectors. Methods: buildCooccurrenceMatrix(interactions), computeSimilarity(itemA, itemB), getSimilarItems(itemId, k).

Create packages/recommendations/src/retrieval/trending.ts - TrendingRetrieval class: time-decayed popularity scoring. Methods: recordInteraction(itemId, timestamp, type), getScore(itemId), getTrending(k, timeWindow). Uses exponential decay.

Create packages/recommendations/src/ranking/mmoe.ts - MMoERanker class: Multi-gate Mixture-of-Experts with multiple objectives (engagement, retention, wellbeing). Methods: forward(features) returning scores per objective, addExpert(expertFn), setGating(gateFn). Implements shared-bottom + task-specific towers.

Create packages/recommendations/src/ranking/score-fusion.ts - ScoreFusion class: weighted ensemble of multiple rankers. Methods: addRanker(name, weight, rankerFn), fuse(candidates) combining scores. Supports normalize-then-weight strategy.

Create packages/recommendations/src/ranking/anti-rage.ts - AntiRageScorer class per spec: computeOutragePenalty(item) with outrage word density (0-0.3), inflammatory quote-retweet ratio (0-0.3), ALL CAPS ratio (0-0.1), exclamation density (0-0.1), angry reply ratio (0-0.2), max 60% reduction. computeReplyQualityBoost(item) boosting thoughtful content.

Create packages/recommendations/src/diversify/dpp.ts - DPPDiversifier class: Determinantal Point Process for result diversity. Methods: diversify(candidates, kernelFn, k) selecting diverse subset, buildKernel(items) computing quality-diversity kernel matrix.

Create packages/recommendations/src/pipeline.ts - RecommendationPipeline class: Full pipeline orchestration: candidates (from retrieval) -> ranking (MMoE + fusion + anti-rage) -> diversification (DPP). Methods: recommend(userId, context, k) returning final ranked list.

Create packages/recommendations/src/on-device-ranker.ts - OnDeviceRanker class: loads ONNX model via @quant/ml-runtime browser runtime, ranks candidates locally. Methods: loadModel(), rankLocally(candidates, userPrefs) where server sends 200 candidates and browser ranks top 20.

Create packages/recommendations/src/experiment/experiment-service.ts - ExperimentService class per spec: assignBucket(userId, experimentId) with deterministic hash, logExposure(userId, experimentId, bucket), computeResult(experimentId) returning { pValue, lift, significant }. Uses proper statistical test (z-test for proportions).
Create packages/recommendations/src/retrieval/index.ts - barrel exports for two-tower, collaborative, trending.
Create packages/recommendations/src/ranking/index.ts - barrel exports for mmoe, score-fusion, anti-rage.
Create packages/recommendations/src/diversify/index.ts - barrel exports for dpp.
Create packages/recommendations/src/experiment/index.ts - barrel exports for experiment-service.
Update packages/recommendations/src/index.ts to add exports for all new modules: retrieval/*, ranking/*, diversify/*, pipeline, on-device-ranker, experiment/*.
Update packages/recommendations/src/types.ts to add any new types needed (ContentItem for anti-rage, UserPrefs for on-device ranker, Experiment types).
Create packages/recommendations/src/__tests__/two-tower.test.ts - Test user/item encoding, ANN retrieval returns candidates.
Create packages/recommendations/src/__tests__/collaborative.test.ts - Test co-occurrence matrix building, similarity computation.
Create packages/recommendations/src/__tests__/trending.test.ts - Test time-decayed scoring, trending retrieval.
Create packages/recommendations/src/__tests__/mmoe.test.ts - Test multi-objective scoring, expert/gating setup.
Create packages/recommendations/src/__tests__/score-fusion.test.ts - Test weighted ensemble, normalization.

Create packages/recommendations/src/__tests__/anti-rage.test.ts - Test outrage penalty computation: rage-bait content gets penalized, quality content gets boosted. Verify max 60% penalty cap. Verify rage-bait ranks LOWER despite higher CTR.
Create packages/recommendations/src/__tests__/dpp.test.ts - Test diversity selection, kernel computation.
Create packages/recommendations/src/__tests__/pipeline.test.ts - Test full pipeline: retrieval -> ranking -> diversification. Verify <50ms (mocked).
Create packages/recommendations/src/__tests__/on-device-ranker.test.ts - Test model loading, local ranking of candidates.

Create packages/recommendations/src/__tests__/experiment-service.test.ts - Test deterministic bucket assignment (same user+experiment = same bucket), exposure logging, p-value computation with known data.
Run NODE_OPTIONS='' npx vitest run to verify all tests pass.
acceptance_criteria: Two-Tower retrieval encodes user/item and retrieves candidates via ANN
Item-item collaborative produces similarity scores from co-occurrence
Trending retrieval uses time-decayed popularity scoring
MMoE ranker handles multiple objectives (engagement, retention, wellbeing)
Score fusion combines multiple rankers with weighted ensemble
AntiRageScorer penalizes rage-bait (max 60% reduction), rage-bait ranks LOWER despite higher CTR
DPP diversifier selects diverse subsets from candidates
Pipeline orchestrates retrieval -> ranking -> diversification in <50ms (mocked)
OnDeviceRanker loads ONNX model and ranks top 20 from 200 candidates locally
ExperimentService: deterministic bucket assignment, correct p-value calculation
findings: All 66 tests pass across 10 test files (two-tower, collaborative, trending, mmoe, score-fusion, anti-rage, dpp, pipeline, on-device-ranker, experiment-service). Fixed collaborative filtering similarity to use user-based set cosine similarity instead of co-occurrence vector cosine (keys never overlap in co-occurrence maps). Pre-existing shared-ui failures (26 tests) remain unchanged. Prettier reformatted on commit via lint-staged. Created package.json, tsconfig.json, vitest.config.ts for the recommendations package.
